title: Chorilepis forbesii
taxonomy: Chorilepis forbesii is a species of flowering plant in the family Podocarpaceae. It is native to the Indian subcontinent, specifically in the Western Ghats and Eastern Ghats mountain ranges. The plant is classified as a conifer, with needle-like leaves and cones as reproductive structures. The family Podocarpaceae is a group of coniferous plants that are primarily found in the Southern Hemisphere, with a few species in the Northern Hemisphere. Chorilepis forbesii is one of the many species within this family.
